hackernews.title: Show HN: Channel Surfer – Watch YouTube like it’s cable TV
hackernews.desc: I know, it's a very first-world problem. But in my house, we have a hard time deciding what to watch. Too many options!So I made this to recreate Cable TV for YouTube. I made it so it runs in the browser. Quickly import your subscriptions in the browser via a bookmarklet. No accounts, no sign-ins. Just quickly import your data locally.
hackernews.summary: I know, it's a very first-world problem.

hackernews.title: Mouser: An open source alternative to Logi-Plus mouse software
hackernews.desc: I discovered this project because all-of-a-sudden Logi Options Plus software updater started taking 40-60% of my Intel Macbook Pro until I killed the process (of course it restarts). In my searches I ended up at a reddit discussion where I found other people with same issues.I'm a minor contributor to this project but it aims to reduce/eliminate the need to use Logitech proprietary software and telemetry. We could use help if other people are interested.Please check out the github link for more detailed motivations (eliminating telemetry) as a part of this project. Here is link: https://github.com/TomBadash/MouseControl
hackernews.summary: I discovered this project because all-of-a-sudden Logi Options Plus software updater started taking 40-60% of my Intel M
